records.m_Talk_ENG: You think multiple Corrupted Wedges have formed in the underground cemetery?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think multiple Corrupted Wedges have formed in the underground cemetery?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think multiple Corrupted Wedges have formed in the underground cemetery?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. C.O.s keep showing up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. C.O.s keep showing up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. C.O.s keep showing up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seems like another Wedge has appeared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seems like another Wedge has appeared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seems like another Wedge has appeared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then isn't this out of your hands, Puppy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then isn't this out of your hands, Puppy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then isn't this out of your hands, Puppy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: True. I was kind of thinking the same thing, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: True. I was kind of thinking the same thing, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: True. I was kind of thinking the same thing, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I factor in the cost of my flight, I'm at a loss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I factor in the cost of my flight, I'm at a loss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I factor in the cost of my flight, I'm at a loss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to squeeze more out of this to break even.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to squeeze more out of this to break even.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to squeeze more out of this to break even.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's too dangerous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's too dangerous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's too dangerous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're an exorcist, not a Corruption disaster specialist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're an exorcist, not a Corruption disaster specialist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're an exorcist, not a Corruption disaster specialist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... I know that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... I know that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... I know that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the pay this time is really good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the pay this time is really good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the pay this time is really good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is my chance to milk it even more.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is my chance to milk it even more.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is my chance to milk it even more.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Corrupted Wedge didn't seem like it had been here for long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Corrupted Wedge didn't seem like it had been here for long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Corrupted Wedge didn't seem like it had been here for long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe the others are in a similar state?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe the others are in a similar state?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe the others are in a similar state?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come back, and I'll bake you more egg tarts, all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come back, and I'll bake you more egg tarts, all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come back, and I'll bake you more egg tarts, all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There it is, that look like you've lost everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There it is, that look like you've lost everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There it is, that look like you've lost everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But money... It's more money...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But money... It's more money...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But money... It's more money...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's how business works. Sometimes you take a loss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's how business works. Sometimes you take a loss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's how business works. Sometimes you take a loss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't expect to always come out on top.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't expect to always come out on top.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't expect to always come out on top.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's where you're wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's where you're wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's where you're wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When you run a business, profit always comes first...
records.m_Talk_DEU: When you run a business, profit always comes first...
records.m_Talk_FRA: When you run a business, profit always comes first...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you have to figure out how to maximize your gains.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you have to figure out how to maximize your gains.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you have to figure out how to maximize your gains.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, you have zero business sense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, you have zero business sense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, you have zero business sense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need business sense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need business sense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need business sense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've managed to take care of you just fine, haven't I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've managed to take care of you just fine, haven't I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've managed to take care of you just fine, haven't I?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because you are grounded in the monastery and need someone to go out and work for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because you are grounded in the monastery and need someone to go out and work for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because you are grounded in the monastery and need someone to go out and work for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If anything, I grew up great considering my circumstances.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If anything, I grew up great considering my circumstances.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If anything, I grew up great considering my circumstances.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
So in conclusion, I raised you well
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
So in conclusion, I raised you well
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
So in conclusion, I raised you well
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This smell...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This smell...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This smell...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You picked up another stench?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You picked up another stench?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You picked up another stench?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, this one's different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, this one's different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, this one's different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blood?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blood?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blood?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's thick... really thick.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's thick... really thick.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's thick... really thick.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There... might be an injured person inside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There... might be an injured person inside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There... might be an injured person inside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you really going to rescue them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you really going to rescue them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you really going to rescue them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course I am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course I am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course I am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right now, everything I find in this estate is money.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right now, everything I find in this estate is money.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right now, everything I find in this estate is money.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A human life can turn quite the profit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A human life can turn quite the profit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A human life can turn quite the profit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't argue with that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't argue with that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't argue with that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if it looks like a loss, you're getting out of there immediately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if it looks like a loss, you're getting out of there immediately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if it looks like a loss, you're getting out of there immediately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. The word loss isn't in my dictionary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. The word loss isn't in my dictionary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. The word loss isn't in my dictionary.
